title: How do N2 weapons work
wikitext:
[]: How do N^2 weapons work?             Quote Post by Karma Burn » Thu Jul 01, 2004 3:43 pm Anybody remeber how N^2 weapons work? I'm pretty sure they explain it in the show once.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Thu Jul 01, 2004 3:45 pm Lots and lots of dynamite. They don't really explain how they work in the show. All they do is say that they are the strongest explosive devices humanity has aside from nuclear weapons.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jul 02, 2004 11:40 am N^2, as in Non-Nuclear. To my knowledge, they work in a manner similar to nuclear warheads, however without the fallout. I cannot recall if nuclear material is incorporated. It is essentially a bomb with destructive capacity close to that of a low yield nuclear bomb, but without any of the fallout.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Jul 06, 2004 3:38 pm didnt seem low yield when they let one down on tokyo 3...

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Tue Jul 06, 2004 8:46 pm yeah the damn thing blew threw the Geofront armor! Somthing that took Zureiel two shots to do!! The damn 14th angel for crying out loud!!
